{{Infobox group
| name = Empire (Cradle)
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

''See also: [[Empire (Cradle) Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Blackflame Empire]] is a vast civilization located in the east of the world known as [[Cradle]]. Originally, the land was ruled by [[dragons]] who discovered a massive, dangerous underground complex during their era. Following the downfall of these [[dragons]], the [[Blackflame family]] rose to power by tapping into a source of strength located beneath the empire's birthplace. The current ruler is [[Emperor Naru Huan]], an Overlord and patriarch of the [[Naru clan]], who possesses [[emerald]] wings. The empire is supported by various major families and clans, as well as servant families like the [[Naru clan]], who manage daily operations. The [[Skysworn]] serve as a specialized force of judges and police empowered by the empire to punish criminals. While [[the Emperor]] holds authority over large territories, including the [[Desolate Wilds]], the empire's reach has been declining for several generations. The imperial capital is situated in [[Blackflame City]], which contains numerous large facilities and massive urban areas. The empire's stability is considered fragile, as it relies on the strength of its ruling families and their disciples to maintain power.}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[The Empire]] is a political entity.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c7">''Soulsmith'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] has homes in the Empire.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c2">''Blackflame'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[The Empire]] contains great clans.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16">''Blackflame'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Chen]] and [[Lindon]] are currently in the real Empire.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21">''Blackflame'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[The Empire]] is a powerful entity capable of executing entire clans if they are detected. Though [[Eithan]] speaks of the Empire with great affection, his own actions may have indirectly caused its total destruction. While [[Lindon]] expresses a desire to serve the Empire, the [[Skysworn]] ensure his group is never placed in a position that could threaten it. Despite being described as possessing the largest hammer, the Empire faces a significant crisis and will only issue light punishments to [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] for their absence.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[The Empire]] is capable of executing a clan if they detect them.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2">''Skysworn'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan]] refers to his beloved Empire.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6">''Skysworn'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan]]'s actions may have indirectly led to the destruction of the entire Empire.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7">''Skysworn'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] wishes to serve the Empire.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13">''Skysworn'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[The Empire]] is described as having the biggest hammer.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c15">''Skysworn'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Skysworn]] will not put [[Lindon]]'s group anywhere that could hurt the Empire.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[The Empire]] is in a crisis.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c16">''Skysworn'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[The Empire]] will punish [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] lightly for their absence.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c18">''Skysworn'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[The Empire]] is the political entity the [[Skysworn]] serves.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c2">''Ghostwater'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[The Empire]] is described as tiny and insignificant by the [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19">''Ghostwater'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Orthos]] passes through a portal back to the Empire.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8">''Underlord'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Blackflame]] boy was near the border of Empire territory.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10">''Underlord'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Akura]] are located within the Empire.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c15">''Underlord'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[The Empire]] has better lines of communication than the [[Frozen Blade school]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c9">''Uncrowned'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Naru Saeya]] tells [[Lindon]] to present himself to [[the Emperor]] when he returns to the Empire.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Empire]] has members who can borrow [[Monarch]] power.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17">''Waybound'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|“How dare you suggest that I wouldn't do my duty for my beloved Empire?”<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|“I'd like to join as well,” he said. “To serve the Empire.”<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“When you make it back to the Empire,” she said, "present yourself to the Emperor. You have done us proud."<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
